name: Brass Elbow Fitting 90°
shortDescription: Precision-machined 90° brass elbow fitting for plumbing and industrial piping systems.
description: Our Brass Elbow Fitting 90° is manufactured from high-quality CZ121 free-cutting brass, delivering superior durability and corrosion resistance. Designed for residential and commercial plumbing, HVAC, and pneumatic systems, these fittings ensure leak-free connections with precision-machined threads. Available in BSP and NPT thread configurations across a wide range of sizes.

name: Brass Tee Fitting
shortDescription: Heavy-duty brass tee fitting for branching pipe connections in plumbing and gas systems.
description: The Brass Tee Fitting provides a reliable three-way connection for piping systems. Manufactured from CW614N brass alloy with precision-cut threads, it is ideal for water distribution, gas lines, and industrial fluid systems. The robust construction ensures long service life even under demanding conditions.

name: Brass Cross Fitting
shortDescription: Four-way brass cross fitting for complex piping configurations and distribution systems.
description: The Brass Cross Fitting enables four-way connections in piping systems, essential for complex distribution networks. Made from premium free-cutting brass with precision-machined threads on all four ports, ensuring reliable and leak-proof connections in water, gas, and pneumatic applications.

name: Brass Union Fitting
shortDescription: Brass union fitting for easy assembly and disassembly of piping connections.
description: Our Brass Union Fitting features a three-piece design that allows easy connection and disconnection without disturbing the existing piping. Ideal for maintenance-critical applications in plumbing, heating systems, and industrial setups. The brass-to-brass seat ensures a reliable metal-to-metal seal.

name: Brass Coupling Fitting
shortDescription: Standard brass coupling for joining two pipes of the same diameter.
description: The Brass Coupling Fitting provides a simple and effective way to join two pipes of the same size. Manufactured with precision internal threads from high-quality free-cutting brass, ensuring a tight and secure connection for water, air, and gas applications.

name: Brass Reducer Fitting
shortDescription: Brass reducer fitting for connecting pipes of different diameters.
description: Our Brass Reducer Fitting enables smooth transition between different pipe sizes. Precision-machined from CW614N brass with both male and female thread options, it maintains optimal flow characteristics while providing a leak-free connection in plumbing and industrial systems.

name: Brass Bushing Fitting
shortDescription: Brass hex bushing for reducing pipe connections with external hex for easy installation.
description: The Brass Bushing Fitting features an external hex design for easy wrench installation. Made from premium free-cutting brass, it provides a reliable reduction connection between larger and smaller pipe sizes. The hex shape allows for secure tightening without special tools.

name: Brass Street Elbow 45°
shortDescription: 45° brass street elbow with male-female configuration for directional pipe changes.
description: Our 45° Brass Street Elbow features a male-female thread configuration for compact directional changes in piping systems. The street design eliminates the need for an additional nipple, saving space and reducing potential leak points.

name: Brass Compression Fitting
shortDescription: Brass compression fitting for secure, solder-free pipe connections.
description: The Brass Compression Fitting provides a solder-free, reliable connection for copper, plastic, and PEX tubing. Featuring a nut and ferrule design that creates a watertight seal when tightened, it is ideal for both DIY and professional plumbing installations.

name: Brass Flare Fitting
shortDescription: Brass flare fitting for high-pressure refrigeration and gas applications.
description: Our Brass Flare Fitting is designed for high-pressure applications in refrigeration, gas, and automotive systems. The 45° flare design provides a vibration-resistant seal that remains secure even under thermal cycling and mechanical stress.

name: Brass Ball Valve
shortDescription: Full-bore brass ball valve for reliable on/off flow control.
description: Our Brass Ball Valve features a full-bore design for unrestricted flow, precision-polished brass ball, and PTFE seats for leak-free operation. The chrome-plated lever handle provides smooth quarter-turn operation. Suitable for water, gas, oil, and compressed air applications.

name: Brass Gate Valve
shortDescription: Heavy-duty brass gate valve for full flow isolation in piping systems.
description: The Brass Gate Valve provides full-bore isolation in piping systems with minimal pressure drop. The rising-stem design offers clear visual indication of valve position. Manufactured from forged brass body with precision-machined gate and PTFE packing.

name: Brass Check Valve (Non-Return)
shortDescription: Brass spring-loaded check valve preventing backflow in piping systems.
description: Our Brass Check Valve features a spring-loaded disc design that automatically prevents reverse flow in piping systems. The compact in-line design requires minimal installation space while providing reliable backflow prevention for water, air, and non-aggressive fluid applications.

name: Brass Globe Valve
shortDescription: Brass globe valve for precise flow regulation and throttling applications.
description: The Brass Globe Valve is designed for applications requiring precise flow regulation and throttling control. The disc-and-seat design allows for fine adjustment of flow rate. Manufactured from forged brass with a renewable seat and PTFE packing for extended service life.

name: Brass Butterfly Valve
shortDescription: Compact brass butterfly valve for space-efficient flow control.
description: Our Brass Butterfly Valve offers compact and lightweight flow control with a quarter-turn operation. The wafer-type design fits between standard flanges without additional gaskets, making it ideal for applications where space is limited and full-bore flow is not critical.

name: Brass Needle Valve
shortDescription: Precision brass needle valve for fine flow metering and control.
description: The Brass Needle Valve provides extremely precise flow control with a tapered needle and seat design. Ideal for instrumentation, sampling, and metering applications where accurate flow adjustment is critical. Features a bonnet seal and fine thread stem for micro-adjustment capability.

name: Brass Safety Relief Valve
shortDescription: Brass pressure safety relief valve for system overpressure protection.
description: Our Brass Safety Relief Valve automatically opens to release excess pressure and protects piping systems from dangerous overpressure conditions. Pre-set to specified relief pressure with certified flow capacity. Essential safety component for boilers, pressure vessels, and compressed air systems.

name: Brass Solenoid Valve Body
shortDescription: Precision-machined brass body for solenoid valve assemblies.
description: Our Brass Solenoid Valve Body is precision-machined to exacting tolerances for integration with solenoid valve assemblies. The body features precision-bored internal chambers, clean port threads, and smooth internal passages for optimal flow characteristics in automated fluid control systems.

name: Brass Hose Barb Connector
shortDescription: Brass hose barb connector for secure hose-to-pipe connections.
description: The Brass Hose Barb Connector features precision-machined barbs that grip hose material securely, providing a reliable connection between flexible hoses and rigid piping. Available in straight and elbow configurations with various barb sizes to match common hose diameters.

name: Brass Push-to-Connect Fitting
shortDescription: Tool-free brass push-fit connector for quick pipe connections.
description: Our Brass Push-to-Connect Fitting enables instant, tool-free connections for copper, PEX, and CPVC tubing. The internal grab ring and O-ring seal provide a secure, leak-free connection that can be disconnected and reused. Ideal for fast installations and repair work.

name: Brass Quick-Connect Coupling
shortDescription: Brass quick-disconnect coupling for rapid connection and release.
description: The Brass Quick-Connect Coupling enables rapid one-handed connection and disconnection of fluid lines. The precision-machined components ensure reliable sealing and minimal fluid loss during connection changes. Designed for pneumatic tools, hydraulic circuits, and industrial fluid transfer.

name: Brass Bulkhead Connector
shortDescription: Brass bulkhead connector for through-panel pipe connections.
description: Our Brass Bulkhead Connector provides a sealed pass-through connection for pipes through walls, tanks, and panels. The nut-and-washer design creates a watertight seal on both sides of the mounting surface, ensuring reliable connections in tank and enclosure applications.

name: Brass Pipe Nipple
shortDescription: Double-ended brass pipe nipple for joining two female fittings.
description: The Brass Pipe Nipple features male threads on both ends for joining two female-threaded fittings or equipment. Available in close, short, and long lengths to suit various installation requirements. Precision-machined from solid brass bar stock for consistent thread quality.

name: Brass Adapter (Male-Female)
shortDescription: Brass thread adapter for converting between male and female connections.
description: Our Brass Male-Female Adapter enables conversion between different thread types and sizes. Available in BSP-to-NPT, metric-to-imperial, and various size reduction or enlargement configurations. Precision-machined threads ensure compatibility and leak-free performance.

name: Brass Swivel Connector
shortDescription: Brass swivel connector allowing rotational freedom in pipe connections.
description: The Brass Swivel Connector features a rotating nut design that allows angular adjustment and rotational freedom during installation. This prevents thread damage from pipe alignment issues and reduces stress on connected equipment. Sealed with an internal O-ring for leak prevention.

name: Brass Hex Bolt
shortDescription: Corrosion-resistant brass hex bolt for marine and decorative applications.
description: Our Brass Hex Bolt is manufactured from high-quality brass alloy, offering excellent corrosion resistance and an attractive gold finish. Ideal for marine hardware, electrical equipment, and decorative architectural applications where steel fasteners are unsuitable due to corrosion or electrical conductivity concerns.

name: Brass Machine Screw
shortDescription: Precision brass machine screw for electronics and instrument assembly.
description: The Brass Machine Screw is precision-turned for electronics, instrumentation, and decorative hardware applications. Available in Phillips, slotted, and hex socket head styles with standard metric and imperial thread specifications. Non-magnetic and excellent for use near sensitive electronic components.

name: Brass Hex Nut
shortDescription: Standard brass hex nut for pairing with brass bolts and studs.
description: Our Brass Hex Nut is manufactured to DIN 934 / ISO 4032 standards, providing reliable fastening with excellent corrosion resistance. The consistent thread pitch and precise hex dimensions ensure compatibility with standard brass bolts and studs. Ideal for applications requiring non-ferrous fastening solutions.

name: Brass Flat Washer
shortDescription: Brass flat washer for load distribution and surface protection.
description: The Brass Flat Washer distributes fastener load over a larger surface area, preventing damage to softer materials and reducing the chance of loosening due to vibration. Stamped from brass sheet with precise dimensions conforming to DIN 125 / ISO 7089 standards.

name: Brass Threaded Rod
shortDescription: Full-length brass threaded rod for custom-length fastening solutions.
description: Our Brass Threaded Rod provides a fully threaded fastening solution that can be cut to any custom length. Manufactured from solid brass bar stock with precision-rolled threads, it is ideal for suspension, support, and custom assembly applications requiring non-ferrous materials.

name: Brass Wing Nut
shortDescription: Brass wing nut for tool-free hand tightening applications.
description: The Brass Wing Nut features extended wings for comfortable hand tightening without tools. Made from quality brass alloy with a smooth finish, it is ideal for applications requiring frequent adjustment or assembly/disassembly. Available in standard metric and imperial thread sizes.

name: Brass Anchor Bolt
shortDescription: Brass anchor bolt for secure masonry and concrete fixing.
description: Our Brass Anchor Bolt provides reliable anchoring in masonry, concrete, and stone substrates without the risk of galvanic corrosion. The expansion sleeve design ensures a strong grip in the substrate, ideal for coastal and marine environments where steel anchors would corrode rapidly.

name: Brass Threaded Insert (Knurled)
shortDescription: Knurled brass threaded insert for strong threads in plastic and wood.
description: Our Knurled Brass Threaded Insert provides durable metal threads in plastic, wood, and composite materials. The diamond knurl pattern on the outer surface provides maximum resistance to pullout and rotation. Installed via heat, ultrasonic, or press-fit methods depending on the substrate material.

name: Brass Heat-Set Insert
shortDescription: Brass heat-set insert for thermoplastic materials using soldering iron installation.
description: The Brass Heat-Set Insert is designed specifically for thermoplastic materials. Using a heated soldering iron tip, the insert melts into the plastic substrate, and the straight knurl pattern provides strong retention after the plastic solidifies. A fast, reliable, and repeatable installation process.

name: Brass Ultrasonic Insert
shortDescription: Brass insert designed for ultrasonic welding installation in thermoplastics.
description: Our Brass Ultrasonic Insert is optimized for high-volume production lines using ultrasonic welding equipment. The specially designed helical knurl pattern and tapered entry ensure fast, consistent installation with minimum cycle times. Provides high torque-out and pullout values.

name: Brass Press-In Insert
shortDescription: Cold-press brass insert for thermoset and reinforced plastic materials.
description: The Brass Press-In Insert is designed for cold installation into thermoset plastics, composites, and pre-formed holes in metal sheets. The aggressive knurl pattern bites into the substrate material during press insertion, providing strong mechanical retention without the need for heat or ultrasonic equipment.

name: Brass Self-Tapping Insert
shortDescription: Self-tapping brass insert that cuts its own thread during installation.
description: Our Brass Self-Tapping Insert features an external cutting thread that creates its own mating thread in the substrate during installation. Simply screw into a pre-drilled hole using a hex driver. Ideal for wood, soft metals, and rigid plastics where pre-threading is impractical.

name: Brass Expansion Insert
shortDescription: Brass expansion insert that grips substrate material through radial expansion.
description: The Brass Expansion Insert uses a slot-and-mandrel design that causes the insert body to expand radially when the mounting bolt is tightened. This expansion creates a tight mechanical grip in the substrate material. Suitable for thin-walled tubes, sheet materials, and pre-drilled holes.

name: Brass Precision Shaft
shortDescription: CNC-turned brass precision shaft for mechanical and electronic assemblies.
description: Our Brass Precision Shaft is CNC-turned to tight tolerances of ±0.01mm, making it suitable for precision mechanical assemblies, motor components, and electronic connectors. Available in custom diameters and lengths with various end configurations including chamfers, grooves, and threaded ends.

specifications.size: Ø2mm to Ø50mm, length up to 300mm

name: Brass Spacer / Standoff
shortDescription: Precision brass spacer and standoff for PCB mounting and panel spacing.
description: The Brass Spacer/Standoff provides precise spacing between PCBs, mounting panels, and electronic components. Available in male-female, female-female, and male-male configurations with hex or round body options. Precision-machined for consistent length and thread alignment.

name: Brass Dowel Pin
shortDescription: Precision brass dowel pin for alignment and location in assemblies.
description: Our Brass Dowel Pin is precision-ground to h6 tolerance for accurate alignment and location of mating parts in assemblies. The chamfered ends facilitate easy insertion, while the tight tolerance ensures repeatable positioning of components during assembly and maintenance.

name: Brass Sleeve Bushing
shortDescription: Self-lubricating brass sleeve bushing for bearing and guide applications.
description: The Brass Sleeve Bushing provides a low-friction bearing surface for rotating shafts and linear motion applications. The inherent lubricity of brass reduces wear and noise without requiring external lubrication in many applications. Available in standard and custom ID/OD/length combinations.

name: Brass Knurled Thumb Screw
shortDescription: Brass thumb screw with knurled head for tool-free hand operation.
description: Our Brass Knurled Thumb Screw features a diamond-knurled head for comfortable hand tightening without tools. CNC-turned from solid brass bar with precision-machined threads, it is ideal for access panels, electronic equipment, and applications requiring frequent adjustment.

specifications.size: M3 to M10, various head diameters

name: Brass Contact Pin
shortDescription: Precision brass contact pin for electrical connectors and terminals.
description: The Brass Contact Pin is micro-turned to exacting specifications for use in electrical connectors, IC sockets, and terminal blocks. The high electrical conductivity of brass combined with tin or gold plating options ensures reliable low-resistance connections in electronic assemblies.

specifications.finish: Tin Plated / Gold Plated / Nickel Plated

name: Brass Compression Stop Valve
shortDescription: Brass compression stop valve for isolating water supply to fixtures.
description: Our Brass Compression Stop Valve provides local shut-off for individual plumbing fixtures. The compression inlet and threaded outlet allow easy installation on copper tubing without soldering. The quarter-turn or multi-turn operation allows quick isolation for maintenance and emergency situations.

name: Brass P-Trap Component
shortDescription: Brass P-trap component for waste water drainage with water seal.
description: The Brass P-Trap Component maintains a water seal that prevents sewer gases from entering living spaces through drain connections. Manufactured from heavy-gauge brass with polished chrome finish, it provides long-lasting performance in bathroom and kitchen drainage systems.

name: Brass Floor Drain
shortDescription: Brass floor drain with removable strainer for bathroom and utility areas.
description: Our Brass Floor Drain features a robust brass body with a removable strainer grate for easy cleaning and maintenance. Designed for bathroom, shower, balcony, and utility room installations where reliable floor-level drainage is required. Available in round and square grate styles.

specifications.finish: Chrome Plated / Antique Brass / Brushed Nickel

name: Brass Shower Arm Connector
shortDescription: Brass shower arm connector for wall-mounted shower head installation.
description: The Brass Shower Arm Connector provides a reliable connection between the in-wall plumbing and the shower head arm. Featuring a decorative wall flange and precision BSP threads, it creates a professional, leak-free installation for bathroom shower systems.

specifications.finish: Chrome Plated / Brushed Nickel / Matte Black

name: Brass Water Meter Body
shortDescription: Precision-cast brass body housing for residential and commercial water meters.
description: Our Brass Water Meter Body is manufactured through precision casting and CNC machining to accommodate water metering mechanisms. The DZR brass construction ensures long service life in contact with potable water. Designed to meet international metering standards and available in multiple configurations.

name: Brass Tap Spindle
shortDescription: Precision brass tap spindle for faucet valve mechanisms.
description: The Brass Tap Spindle is the core operating component of traditional faucet valve mechanisms. Precision-turned from free-cutting brass with a polished sealing surface, it provides smooth operation and reliable shut-off for kitchen and bathroom taps. Available for various faucet brands and standards.

name: Brass Cable Gland
shortDescription: Brass cable gland for secure cable termination and strain relief.
description: Our Brass Cable Gland provides secure cable attachment, strain relief, and environmental sealing where cables enter electrical enclosures. The nickel-plated brass construction offers excellent corrosion resistance and EMC shielding. Neoprene or silicone sealing inserts provide IP68 protection.

specifications.size: M12 to M75 / PG7 to PG48

name: Brass Terminal Connector
shortDescription: Brass terminal connector for reliable electrical wire termination.
description: The Brass Terminal Connector provides secure electrical wire termination with low contact resistance. Available in ring, spade, pin, and butt-splice configurations. Tin-plated for enhanced solderability and corrosion resistance in demanding electrical environments.

name: Brass Earth Rod Clamp
shortDescription: Brass earthing clamp for connecting conductors to ground rods.
description: Our Brass Earth Rod Clamp creates a reliable, low-resistance connection between earthing conductors and ground rods. The robust brass construction resists soil corrosion, while the bolted design ensures a secure mechanical and electrical connection that maintains its integrity over decades of underground service.

name: Brass Neutral Link
shortDescription: Brass neutral link for switchboard and distribution panel connections.
description: The Brass Neutral Link is a critical component in electrical distribution systems, providing a reliable and accessible neutral connection point in switchboards and distribution panels. Manufactured from high-conductivity brass with multiple cable termination points for organized neutral bus distribution.

name: Brass Switchgear Contact
shortDescription: Precision brass contact for switchgear and circuit breaker assemblies.
description: Our Brass Switchgear Contact is precision-manufactured for use in electrical switchgear, circuit breakers, and contactor assemblies. The silver-plated contact surfaces provide low-resistance switching, while the brass body offers excellent mechanical strength and current-carrying capacity for high-power applications.
